name: Hand Tools
description: Hand Tools by Columbia Tools.

name: Putty Knives
description: Putty Knives by Columbia Tools.

name: Taping Knives
description:
Columbia Tools is proud to launch our all-new Columbia Taping Knives – crafted for professionals who demand speed, precision, comfort, and durability on every job.

Stainless for the price of Carbon

Competitively priced, these stainless steel knives offer unbeatable value—comparable to the cost of carbon steel.

Key Features:

  • Our medium-flex stainless steel blades glide smoothly across the surface, delivering consistent coats and faster finishing with less fatigue.
  • Rubberized comfort grip handle is shaped to give you maximum control and minimal strain, with the most comfort.
  • Each handle is double-riveted to a heavy-gauge aluminum back plate, then over molded for rugged strength and a clean, professional look.
  • Built with high-performance materials and field-tested design – these knives are ready to handle the toughest sites and the longest days.

Available Sizes & Part #:

8” Columbia Taping Knife – CTK8

10” Columbia Taping Knife – CTK10
12” Columbia Taping Knife – CTK12
14” Columbia Taping Knife – CTK14

name: Mud Pans
description:
Order now to be ready for the Launch on December 15, 2024!

Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

Now available in three convenient sizes—12″, 14″, and 16″—there’s a Columbia Mud Pan perfect for any project. The mud pans are sold in packs of 6 to dealers, but you have the flexibility to sell them individually to your customers.

Lifetime Warranty:

We stand by the quality and craftsmanship of our products. Each Columbia Mud Pan is backed by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you can rely on it for years of hard work.

Key Features:

  • Heavy-Gauge Stainless Steel: Engineered for strength and longevity, this mud pan resists wear and tear for reliable, long-term use.
  • Watertight Laser-Welded Seams: Prevents leaks, even under heavy-duty conditions, for consistent performance.
  • Comfortable Grip: Tapered ends and sides provide a secure, ergonomic hold for better control and comfort.
  • Straight Edges: Ideal for wiping joint knives clean, ensuring a mess-free and efficient work process.
  • Complimentary Rubber Grip: Every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a FREE soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use—adding even more value to this already premium tool.
  • Available in 12″, 14″, and 16″ Sizes: Choose the right size for your specific needs and project requirements.

The Columbia Mud Pan—designed for pros, built to last. Available for order now.

Individual Part Numbers:

12” Columbia Mud Pan 6 Pack – C12MP-6

14” Columbia Mud Pan 6 Pack – C14MP-6

16” Columbia Mud Pan 6 Pack- C16MP-6

name: Trowels
description:
Premium Finishing Trowels

Introducing Columbia Trowels – engineered for professionals who demand superior flexibility, strength, and control on every job. Built with hardened stainless steel blades and ground edges with round corners, these trowels deliver smooth, consistent results across a wide range of drywall and finishing tasks.

From the ultra-responsive .3 Super-Flex to the robust .7 Pro-Flex Gold, Columbia offers a full line of trowels in sizes from 12″ to 18″, each designed for a specific level of flex and feel. The ultra-light aluminum high-alloy bar ensures exceptional balance, while the ergonomic, replaceable cork handle provides comfort during long hours of use.

100% made in Poland, Columbia Trowels are the professional’s choice for quality that lasts.

Available Products & Sizes:

  • .7 Pro-Flex Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″

    .7 Curved Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″, 16″

    .4 Curved Silver Trowel: 12″, 14″

    .3 Super-Flex Gold Trowel: 12″, 14″

    Key Features:

    • Ground Edges & Round Corners

      Extreme Quality Hardened Stainless Steel Blade

      Ultra-Light Aluminum High-Alloy Bar

      Ergonomic & Replaceable Cork Handle

      100% Made in Poland

      Individual Part Numbers:

name: Finishing Hawks
description:
Finishing Hawk

Introducing the Columbia Finishing Hawk—crafted for professional drywall finishers who demand precision, comfort, and control. Designed for smooth gliding while working with a trowel or knife, this 13” hawk is built to elevate your finishing workflow.

Made from high-quality aluminum with milled grooves for enhanced grip and material control, it features round corners for safety and smoother handling. The ergonomic, replaceable cork handle and rubber cover offer superior comfort and reduced fatigue during long days on the job.

Proudly 100% made in Poland, the Columbia Finishing Hawk is a trusted tool for flawless finishing.

Available Size:

  • 13”

    Key Features:

    • Round Corners

      High-Quality Aluminum Plate

      Milled Grooves

      Ergonomic & Replaceable Cork Handle

      Rubber Cover

      100% Made in Poland

      Individual Part Numbers:

      13-H-S – 13″ X 13″ HAWK

name: Bucket Scoops
description:
Columbia Tools is proud to introduce our new line of Bucket Scoops – built for durability, comfort, and convenience on the job.

Three Handle Options:

  • One-Piece Stainless Steel: A welded, full tang scoop built tough with all-stainless durability.
  • Rubberized Comfort Grip: Our signature ergonomic handle for all-day comfort and control.
  • Cork Handle: A lightweight, natural grip designed to sit securely on the top of your bucket when not in use.

    Whether you prefer rugged one-piece strength, the comfort of rubber, or the balance of cork, Columbia Bucket Scoops give you the perfect option for your finishing style.

Available Sizes & Part #:

6” One Piece Bucket Scoop (stainless steel) – OPBS

6” Comfort Grip Bucket Scoop (stainless steel) – CBS2K

6″ Cork Handle Bucket Scoop (stainless steel) – BCNC

name: The Tool Sets
description: The Tool Sets by Columbia Tools.

name: The Tactical Set
description:
The NEW Tactical Set makes moving to Automatic Taping Tools easy! Every taping tool you will need to completely finish a house comes packaged inside our durable, rugged Road Case. This set takes the guess work out of choosing the perfect drywall taping tools kit.

Note: Columbia Automatic boxes do not fit in Road Case.

SET INCLUDES:

  • Road Case

  • 10″ Flat Box
  • 12″ Flat Box

  • 7″ Tomahawk
  • 24″ Tomahawk
  • 8″ Throttle Box
  • 3″ Anglehead
  • Hot Mud Pump
  • Box Filler & Gooseneck
  • Corner Roller
  • AHA
  • 3″ Nail Spotter
  • Columbia One Handle and Columbia One EXT
  • Sander Head
  • Twist Lock Handle
  • Tomalock Adapter

name: The Commando Set
description:
The NEW Commando Set from Columbia Tools takes the guess work out of moving over to Semi-Automatic Drywall Tools. This set is a great introduction to Semi-Auto tools for the part-time finisher, or someone who is looking to make the leap to Automatic tools but doesn’t want to jump right in yet. This set will save you time and give you a great finish. The Commando set comes with all the essentials in the Semi-Auto line, as well as a convenient case to store, and keep safe, your new Columbia Tools.

SET INCLUDES:

  • Semi-Automatic Case
  • 2.5″ Standard Flusher (2.5SF)
  • 3″ Standard Flusher (3SF)
  • 42″ Compound Mud Tube (CMT42)
  • Columbia One Extendible Handle – 3′-5′ – (C1HEXT)
  • Columbia One Fixed Handle (C1H)
  • Angle Head Adapter (AHA)
  • Flat Applicator Head (CFLT)
  • Two-Way Internal Applicator (ICATW)
  • Corner Roller Head (CR)

name: The Warrior Set
description:
The New Columbia Warrior set takes the guess work out of starting off with Smoothing Blades. This set contains a variety of sizes that will help you complete most every smoothing blade job. From wiping down tapes, to fully coating walls and ceilings, and everything in between, this kit will have you covered.
The Warrior Set comes with the Tomahawk essentials, as well as a convenient case to protect your investment. The case also makes it easy to get your set onto the job site. Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blades make easy work out of sanding and finishing.

SET INCLUDES:

  • Gun Case
  • 7″ Tomahawk
  • 12″ Tomahawk
  • 18″ Tomahawk
  • 32″ Tomahawk
  • Tomalock Adaptor
  • Columbia One EXT Handle

description:
The New Columbia Sabre set takes the guess work out of starting off with Smoothing Blades. Just like the Tomahawk Warrior set, this set contains a variety of sizes that will help you complete most every smoothing blade job. From wiping down tapes, to fully coating walls and ceilings, and everything in between, this kit will have you covered.

The Sabre Set comes with the Sabre essentials, as well as a convenient case to protect your investment. The case also makes it easy to get your set onto the job site. Columbia Sabre Smoothing Blades make easy work out of sanding and finishing.

name: Automatic Tapers
description: Automatic Tapers by Columbia Tools.

name: Columbia One Predator Taper
description:
The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

FEATURES:

  • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
  • Titanium pull rod
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Reduced Drag system for corners
  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum
  • Quick release cap
  • NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain
  • 53″ in length
  • Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

DOWNLOADS:
features: Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
Titanium pull rod
Adjustable Brake
Quick release for tape changing
Reduced Drag system for corners
Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum
Quick release cap
NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain
53″ in length
Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

name: Automatic Taper
description:
The Columbia Automatic Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 40 years. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to any easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. A hard anodized tube eliminates the track lines that occur on so many other tools. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The NEW Patent Pending Pump Action Sleeve gives the operator the smoothest cut on the market and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

FEATURES:

  • Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Now with NEW Pump Action Sleeve – smoothest cutting sleeve on the market
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Zero Drag system for corners

  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum

name: Tall Boy Mud Pump
description:
We are very proud to offer this tool. After using it, people agree they would never go back to the standard pump again. The Tallboy is a mud pump that will allow you to stand upright while filling your tools. The extra height also allows for use in a 30 gallon pale for those who want to cut down on mixing time.

FEATURES:

  • Ergonomically superior
  • 20 degree angled handle makes pumping easier and more comfortable
  • User can see when taper is full when using goose neck
  • Saves physical stress and energy
  • Moveable bracket to fit all 5 gallon pails

name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5
description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

 

CPFP – Columbia PowerFill Pump (comes with box filler)

CPFGN – Columbia PowerFill Gooseneck (sold seperately)

name: The Road Case
description:
The highly requested Columbia Road Case has an extremely durable design to protect your tools on the job. Built to take the abuses of travel, and wear and tear from job sites, the Road Case comes equipped with rubber feet, rolling wheels and ergonomic handles. This case will hold a full set of Columbia tools, including a pump!

Note: Columbia Automatic boxes do not fit in Road Case.

FEATURES:

  • Most durable tool case on the market
  • Rolling wheels
  • Ergonomical handles on front and side for easy carrying and rolling
  • Rubber feet on bottom for protection and easy grip
  • Latches have locking capabilities
  • Measurements: 17”x9”x57”

description:
Lightweight, but extremely durable, Columbia’s Semi-Automatic case can accommodate a complete semi-automatic set of tools. With the egg-shell foam inside, the case secures the tools in place when it is latched closed. The Semi-Automatic case is also useful for storage of the Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blades (up to 40″). Not intended for automatic tools.

  • Fits a full set of Columbia Semi Automatic Tools
  • Eggshell foam for support
  • 4 lock latches
  • Combination of piano-style and brass hinges for storage safety when locked

name: Smoothing Blades
description: Smoothing Blades by Columbia Tools.

name: Tomahawk Smoothing Blades
description:
The Columbia Tomahawk set of Smoothing Blades is the most durable set on the market today. With no plastic pieces, the Tomahawk doesn’t snap under pressure. And because the blades use a Flat Box handle, there are no plastic adaptors that will break with the weight of the larger blades. This also increases the stability and your ability to adjust the angle of attack while in motion. The Columbia Tomahawk will change what the industry expects from a professional grade Smoothing Blade.

FEATURES:

  • 9 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″
  • Works with a Flat Box handle or use the CLTHA adaptor for the Columbia One handle
  • Interchangeable blades – keep the body, switch out blade when damaged or worn
  • Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
features: Works with a Flat Box handle or use the CLTHA adaptor for the Columbia One handle
Interchangeable blades – keep the body, switch out blade when damaged or worn
Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Tomalock
description:
The Columbia Tomalock is a handle adapter used with the Tomahawk set of Smoothing Blades. With no plastic pieces, the Tomalock doesn’t snap under pressure or the weight of the larger blades. This also increases the stability. The quick release allows you to easily and steadily adjust the angle of attack. The Columbia Tomahawk, combined the Tomalock and the Columbia One Handle, will change what the industry expects from a professional grade Smoothing Blade.

FEATURES:

  • Handle adaptor that allows the user to utilize the Columbia One Handle system with the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades
  • No plastic parts
  • Quick release allows ease of angle adjustment
  • Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
features: Handle adaptor that allows the user to utilize the Columbia One Handle system with the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades

name: Sabre Smoothing Blades
description:
Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

One of the standout features of the Sabre Smoothing Blades is their remarkable weight—around 60% lighter than the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades—making them easier to maneuvre and control. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

FEATURES:

  • 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″
  • Works with by hand or with the Sabre Claw Adapter (SBC) adaptor for the Sabre Pole (SBP)
  • Hardened Stainless Steel Blade: Durable and ultra-abrasion resistant for long-lasting performance.
  • Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Designed to minimise marks and imperfections.
  • High-Performance Bi-Flex Technology: Featuring a PVC plate for enhanced flexibility and control.

name: Fat Boy Smoothing Blades
description:
Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

Available Now

Columbia is proud to launch the Fat Boy Smoothing Blades—built for comfort, precision, and performance.

With a lightweight, rubberized ergonomic grip to reduce slipping, the Fat Boy delivers smooth, even finishes with control. Its replaceable stainless steel blade offers long-term durability, while the new Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw expands your finishing options.

Two new Fiberglass Telescopic Extension Poles debut alongside the blades. Their snap lock system connects seamlessly with the Fat Boy Adapter and also works with our 2K Handle Mud Rollers, giving unmatched versatility.

When used by Hand or handles—the Fat Boy brings efficiency and comfort to every pass.

Key Features:

  • Replaceable  Stainless Blade: Long-lasting and ultra-durable.

    Lightweight & Ergonomic Grip: Designed for comfort, control, and less fatigue.

    Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Minimize lines and imperfections.

    New Fiberglass Telescopic Poles with Snap Lock: Extend your reach and work seamlessly with Fat Boy Blades and 2K Handle Mud Rollers.

    Available Sizes & Part #:

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 7” – FSB7

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 10” – FSB10

name: Finishing Boxes
description: Finishing Boxes by Columbia Tools.

name: Flat Boxes
description:
(5.5FFB, 7FFB, 8FFB, 10FFB, 12FFB, 14FFB)

Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Flat Boxes in the world. From our 5.5” specialty box to our 14” they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been being told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Flat Box we make exceeds your expectations.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 5.5″, 7″, 8″, 10″, 12″ and now 14″ sizes
  • Manual sweeping grip for tight spaces when you cannot actuate the box handle (not on the 5.5″ box)
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Fat Boy Boxes
description:
Columbia offers the widest range of high quality, high capacity finishing boxes in the world. From our 5.5″ Fat Boy to our 12″, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push, and now they’re also the highest capacity on the market. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Fat Boy box we make exceeds your expectations.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 5.5″, 8″, 10″, 12″ sizes
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

DOWNLOADS:
features: Available in 5.5″, 8″, 10″, 12″ sizes
Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead

name: Automatic Flat Boxes
description:
(8FFBA, 10FFBA, 12FFBA, 14FFBA & 8FBBA, 10FBBA, 12FBBA)

Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

Note: Columbia Automatic Boxes do not fit in Road Case.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 8″, 10″, 12″ & 14″ regular and 8″, 10″ & 12″ Fat Boy sizes
  • Engaging axel creates pressure on mud release
  • Over 50% easier to push
  • Great for vertical flats
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Inside Track Conversion Kits
description:
Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Flat Boxes in the world. From our 5.5” specialty box to our 14”, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push.

Use this kit to convert any box (with the exception of automatic boxes) from a regular axel box to an inside track box. Best used on hard to finish areas like bead, butt joints that aren’t fully dry and ceiling pot lights, this box is sure to make your tricky areas much simpler. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Flat Box we make exceeds your expectations.

FEATURES:

  • Available for 5.5″, 7″,  8″, 10″, 12″ and 14″ sizes
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Not available on automatic boxes

Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
Not available on automatic boxes

name: Corner Rollers
description: Corner Rollers by Columbia Tools.

name: Corner Cobra
description:
The Corner Cobra is an amazing time saving tool. It allows the user to roll out No-Coat and other structural corner beads at almost all inside and outside angles. We have heard back from users that it does it quicker and better, which is to us a home run. Another one of our patented products that is changing the time it takes to finish a job.

FEATURES:

  • Works on inside and outside angles from 85 to 180 degrees
  • Sets No-Coat 350 and 425 as well as regular tapes
  • Tracks the centre and outside edge leaving only a knife feather
  • Fits Corner Roller handles
  • Shocks allow for imperfect angles and settings
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Inside Corner Roller
description:
Our Inside Corner Roller offers the easiest roll in the industry. With our split wheel design tapes do not drag upon initial contact. The tape immediately imbeds in the corner with all unneeded compound being pushed out from behind.

FEATURES:

  • Innovative split wheel design
  • Cast aluminum body
  • Hand made from U.S. aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Angleheads
description: Angleheads by Columbia Tools.

name: 2″ Anglehead
description:
The Columbia 2″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

FEATURES:

  • Precision set carbide blades
  • Highly durable stainless wings
  • Comes with wheel kit installed and Allan key for easy removal
  • Slide lock for easy and secure attachment
  • Four sizes available – 2″, 2.5″, 3″ and 3.5″
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Corner Tools
description: Corner Tools by Columbia Tools.

name: 8 Inch Throttle Box
description:
The 8″ Throttle Box is another great product of ours that offers years of great performance. All billet construction with a threaded stainless steel ball, this Corner Box looks and operates seamlessly. All our Corner Boxes now come standard with automatic capabilities, making pushing the box at least 50% easier than standard boxes. The new springs have adjustable tensions and greatly reduce the occurence of air pockets while running. The Throttle Box allows the corners to be quickly coated with your choice of angle head or applicator head. *Patent Pending

FEATURES:

  • Available in 7″ and 8″ sizes
  • New spring tension allows for 50% easier push
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Patent Pending

description:
The Semi-Automatic Taper or “Bucket Taper” allows users to apply a specific amount of compound to a large volume of tape. It has a tape spool with brake to cut down on operator fatigue. Columbia’s semi automatic taper is easy to use, durable and has laser engraved instruction on the door.

name: Sanders
description: Sanders by Columbia Tools.

name: Sander Head
description:
The Columbia Sander Head incorporates all of the industry’s preferred functionalities in the first fully machined billet aluminum body. Utilizing our No Flip technology, our Sander Head flows smoothly on the wall.

We have chosen to use the standard paint handle thread to give users many handle options. The handle will fit any paint handle fixed or extendable.

Features:

  • Guaranteed No Flip Technology
  • Industry preferred design
  • Works with paint handle thread
  • Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: The Phantom Sander
description:
The Columbia Phantom DDM Sander incorporates all of the industries preferred functionality in a beautifully machine billet body. This commercial grade dustless sander works with any vacuum with a 1.5″ inlet and collects 99% of dust! The Phantom comes with the all billet aluminum sanding head, the 30 ft hose, and the extendible (26″ to 46″) pole.

  • All billet aluminum head

description: Applicators by Columbia Tools.

name: External Corner Applicator
description:
The Columbia External 90 ° Mud Applicator works for all sizes of outside bead as it puts out 3 layers of mud, one in the middle, and one on each side. The amount of pressure applied to the tube will dictate how much mud you need for larger or smaller bead. These applicators are machined from solid billet aluminum and are very accurate as their Delrin wheels glide along the wall.

name: Handles
description: Handles by Columbia Tools.

name: Columbia One
description:
The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nail Spotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the One system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. Add a Tomalock adaptor and you can even use this handle with Flat Boxes if necessary.  This One handle is all you’ll need.

FEATURES:

  • Comes in two fixed lengths (4′ and 18″) and a 3 – 5′ extendible version
  • AHA Adaptor needed to use with Angleheads
  • Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
  • Comfort grips
  • Thickest, strongest and lightest handle on the market

The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

  • First Flat Box Handle handmade solely from U.S. billet aluminum

description:
The Columbia 180 degree Grip Flat Box Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Flat Box Handle is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

The 180 degree Grip allows for continuous breaking over the entire range of motion – a complete 180 degrees. This ensures that you never lose your grip when adjusting your position. Extra strong aluminum design for years of rugged use.

Features:

  • 180 degree grip allows for continuous breaking
  • Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and
    steel components
  • Comes in 3ft, 42″, 4ft, 5ft and 6ft
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
  • Comfort grips
  • Thickest, strongest and lightest handle on the market

DOWNLOADS:

name: Compound Tubes
description:
Columbia Compound Tubes have taken the market place by storm. Finally a high quality long lasting tube that is easy to push. We have had many customers, after trying this tube, report back that they changed over their entire fleet.

FEATURES:

  • Sizes 24″, 32″, 42″, and 55″ available
  • A combination of factors result in the compound being easily pushed through your tools
  • Stainless steel ball
  • Hand made from U.S. aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Cam Lock Tube
description:
Our Cam Lock Tube is so simple and so positive we would not recommend using any other tube when it comes to fast set compounds. The brass cams easily find and lock to the stainless ring using the same technology as a firehose.

FEATURES:

  • Brass cams on a stainless steel lock ring
  • Quick remove bottom for complete cleaning
  • Hand made from U.S. aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Cam Lock Tube Box Filler
description:
Our Cam Lock Tube Box Filler is a simple attachment to the Cam Lock Compound Tube, that allows you to easily fill your Flat Finishing Boxes without the use of a Hot Mud Pump. This is a great addition to any finisher’s tool collection.

FEATURES:

  • Attaches on to the head of the Columbia Cam Lock Compound Tube
  • Hand made from U.S. aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

name: Inside 90 Grooved Mud Heads
description:
Proportionate grooves give you a consistent mud distribution on the 90 degree inside angle and speeds up the pre-filling process. Made out of UHMW, the strong durable design makes these Mud Heads the best on the market.

Features:

  • Available in Inside 90° angle
  • Quick release clip
  • Channeled grooves for evenly dispersed mud and controlled flow
  • Long lasting, durable and strong
  • Machined using top quality Ultra High Molecular Weight materials
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
